title: Smithery MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol server in the Smithery registry

qualifiedName.description: Unique server identifier in namespace/server-name format

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the server

description.description: Description of what the server does and its capabilities

iconUrl.description: URL to the server's icon image

isVerified.description: Whether the server has been verified by Smithery

useCount.description: Number of times the server has been used/installed

namespace.description: The namespace (organization or user) that owns this server

tools.description: Tools exposed by this MCP server

connections.description: Available connection methods for this server
